name: Writing Center’s Presentation and Workshop Request Portals Closed for Spring
summary: The UNLV Writing Center ’s Informational Presentation and Customized Workshop Request Portals are closed for the Spring 2026 semester. The portals will reopen on Monday, May 18 for Summer 2 and 3 presentation and workshop requests.
